高级数据工程师招聘。负责实时/离线数仓建设、湖仓一体、ETL 优化、元数据管理、数据治理。

Spark Spark Spark Spark Spark — distributed compute.
Flink Flink Flink Flink Flink — stream processing.
Kafka Kafka Kafka Kafka Kafka — messaging.
Hive Hive Hive Hive Hive — data warehouse.
Airflow Airflow Airflow Airflow Airflow — workflow orchestration.
ClickHouse ClickHouse ClickHouse ClickHouse ClickHouse — OLAP.
Iceberg Iceberg Iceberg Iceberg Iceberg — table format.

需要熟悉 Spark、Flink、Kafka、Hive、Airflow、ClickHouse、Iceberg、Hudi、数据建模、数据治理、元数据管理、性能优化。4+ years data engineering experience required.
